{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Human Resources Officer",
  "description": "Maywood Lending Limitedis a financial organization dedicated to meeting the financial needs of citizens across Nigeria by providing accessible loan services whenever our customers require financial support.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Officer

Job Location: Agidingbi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Assist in end-to-end recruitment processes (job postings, shortlisting, interviews, onboarding).
	Maintain and update employee records and HR databases accurately.
	Support the administration of employee benefits, payroll inputs, and leave management.
	Help implement HR policies and procedures to ensure compliance with labor laws and company standards.
	Provide support in performance management activities, including appraisals and feedback processes.
	Address routine employee queries regarding HR policies, benefits, and procedures.
	Assist in organizing training sessions, employee engagement activities, and other HR-related events.
	Prepare HR-related reports as required (headcount, turnover, leave summaries, etc.).
	Support disciplinary and grievance processes under supervision.
	Perform other HR administrative duties as assigned.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Social Sciences, or a related field.
	3 - 5 years of relevant experience in HR.
	Knowledge of HR best practices and Nigerian labor law (or relevant local labor laws).
	Good interpersonal and communication skills.
	Strong organizational and administrative abilities.
	Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint); familiarity with HRIS is an advantage.
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information professionally.


Salary
N200,000 - N240,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: idowu@maywood.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-21",

  },

Human Resources Officer Job at Maywood Lending Limited




        
    

        
        Maywood Lending Limitedis a financial organization dedicated to meeting the financial needs of citizens across Nigeria by providing accessible loan services whenever our customers require financial support.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Officer

Job Location: Agidingbi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist in end-to-end recruitment processes (job postings, shortlisting, interviews, onboarding).
	Maintain and update employee records and HR databases accurately.
	Support the administration of employee benefits, payroll inputs, and leave management.
	Help implement HR policies and procedures to ensure compliance with labor laws and company standards.
	Provide support in performance management activities, including appraisals and feedback processes.
	Address routine employee queries regarding HR policies, benefits, and procedures.
	Assist in organizing training sessions, employee engagement activities, and other HR-related events.
	Prepare HR-related reports as required (headcount, turnover, leave summaries, etc.).
	Support disciplinary and grievance processes under supervision.
	Perform other HR administrative duties as assigned.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Social Sciences, or a related field.
	3 - 5 years of relevant experience in HR.
	Knowledge of HR best practices and Nigerian labor law (or relevant local labor laws).
	Good interpersonal and communication skills.
	Strong organizational and administrative abilities.
	Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint); familiarity with HRIS is an advantage.
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information professionally.


Salary
N200,000 - N240,000 per month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Officer",
  "description": "E.C Supply, a vendor for male street wear and accessories, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer
Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time, Hybrid (Mondays and Saturdays compulsory)
Sector: Fashion Retail

Job Summary


	Are you organized, detail-oriented, and experienced in inventory management? We are looking for a reliable Inventory Officer to help maintain accurate stock records and support efficient store operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Record and monitor incoming and outgoing inventory accurately
	Reconcile stock regularly and investigate discrepancies
	Maintain organized and up-to-date inventory records
	Support stock planning and replenishment activities
	Prepare inventory reports and highlight variances


Requirements


	Previous experience in inventory management or a similar role
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and inventory management tools
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Ability to identify inconsistencies, errors, and stock variances
	Calm, composed, and professional under pressure
	Honest, trustworthy, and accountable
	Experience with Zoho is an added advantage.


Salary
N150,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief cover letter to: joyomofumaa@gmail.com using &#39;&#39;Inventory Officer Application&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Inventory Officer Job at E.C Supply




        
    

        
        E.C Supply, a vendor for male street wear and accessories, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer
Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time, Hybrid (Mondays and Saturdays compulsory)
Sector: Fashion Retail

Job Summary


	Are you organized, detail-oriented, and experienced in inventory management? We are looking for a reliable Inventory Officer to help maintain accurate stock records and support efficient store operations.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Record and monitor incoming and outgoing inventory accurately
	Reconcile stock regularly and investigate discrepancies
	Maintain organized and up-to-date inventory records
	Support stock planning and replenishment activities
	Prepare inventory reports and highlight variances


Requirements


	Previous experience in inventory management or a similar role
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and inventory management tools
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Ability to identify inconsistencies, errors, and stock variances
	Calm, composed, and professional under pressure
	Honest, trustworthy, and accountable
	Experience with Zoho is an added advantage.


Salary
N150,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief cover letter to: [email protected] using ''Inventory Officer Application" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Mobile App Developer",
  "description": "eStream is a provider of broadband network infrastructure and connectivity solutions. We are dedicated to providing various services for commercial and public enterprises regardless of their size using Fiber, Satellite Technology, and Radio Communication systems.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mobile App Developer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced Mobile App Developer to design, develop, and maintain high-quality mobile applications that align with business objectives and deliver excellent user experiences.
	The successful candidate will work with cross-functional teams to gather requirements, build scalable solutions, implement new features, and ensure mobile applications remain secure, responsive, and optimised for performance. &nbsp;


Key Responsibilities
Technical Development:


	Design, develop, and maintain mobile and web-based applications from concept to deployment.
	Write clean, scalable code and conduct unit testing and debugging to ensure high-quality applications.
	Build mobile applications compatible across multiple platforms and devices.
	Implement updates and improvements based on application reviews and performance analysis.
	Collaborate with UI/UX designers to create intuitive and engaging user interfaces.
	Manage source code using version control systems such as Git.
	Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends in mobile development.


Collaboration &amp; Communication:


	Work closely with cross-functional teams including ICT professionals, analysts, and designers to define application features and improvements.
	Communicate technical issues clearly and contribute to problem-solving initiatives.


Customer &amp; Performance Focus:


	Resolve mobile application incidents promptly to ensure internal user satisfaction. &nbsp;
	Monitor application performance including uptime, responsiveness, and reliability.
	Ensure mobile applications are optimized for performance, speed, and responsiveness. &nbsp;


Work Schedule:


	Work Mode: On-site for the first 3 months, then Hybrid (3 days in office, 2 days remote)
	Work Hours: 8:00 AM &ndash; 5:00 PM, Monday &ndash; Friday


Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.&nbsp;


Certifications:


	Flutter Certified Application Developer or React Native certification is an added advantage. &nbsp;


Experience:


	3 years of proven experience as a mobile or app developer with a strong portfolio of projects.
	Experience with app store submission processes and app lifecycle management.&nbsp;
	Experience working with databases such as SQLite, Firebase, or similar technologies. &nbsp;
	Familiarity with cloud services such as AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure.
	Knowledge of backend technologies such as Node.js, Python, or PHP is an advantage. &nbsp;
	Familiarity with development tools such as Android Studio and Xcode. &nbsp;


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Proficiency in Flutter and React Native for cross-platform development.
	Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
	Knowledge of UI/UX principles and best practices.
	Experience using version control tools such as Git.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills. &nbsp;


Working Conditions:


	The role requires working in an air-conditioned office environment for extended periods and may occasionally require off-site work.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: hr@estreamnetworks.net using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Mobile App Developer Job at eStream




        
    

        
        eStream is a provider of broadband network infrastructure and connectivity solutions. We are dedicated to providing various services for commercial and public enterprises regardless of their size using Fiber, Satellite Technology, and Radio Communication systems.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mobile App Developer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced Mobile App Developer to design, develop, and maintain high-quality mobile applications that align with business objectives and deliver excellent user experiences.
	The successful candidate will work with cross-functional teams to gather requirements, build scalable solutions, implement new features, and ensure mobile applications remain secure, responsive, and optimised for performance.  


Key Responsibilities
Technical Development:


	Design, develop, and maintain mobile and web-based applications from concept to deployment.
	Write clean, scalable code and conduct unit testing and debugging to ensure high-quality applications.
	Build mobile applications compatible across multiple platforms and devices.
	Implement updates and improvements based on application reviews and performance analysis.
	Collaborate with UI/UX designers to create intuitive and engaging user interfaces.
	Manage source code using version control systems such as Git.
	Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends in mobile development.


Collaboration & Communication:


	Work closely with cross-functional teams including ICT professionals, analysts, and designers to define application features and improvements.
	Communicate technical issues clearly and contribute to problem-solving initiatives.


Customer & Performance Focus:


	Resolve mobile application incidents promptly to ensure internal user satisfaction.  
	Monitor application performance including uptime, responsiveness, and reliability.
	Ensure mobile applications are optimized for performance, speed, and responsiveness.  


Work Schedule:


	Work Mode: On-site for the first 3 months, then Hybrid (3 days in office, 2 days remote)
	Work Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Monday – Friday


Requirements
Educational Qualification:


	Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. 


Certifications:


	Flutter Certified Application Developer or React Native certification is an added advantage.  


Experience:


	3 years of proven experience as a mobile or app developer with a strong portfolio of projects.
	Experience with app store submission processes and app lifecycle management. 
	Experience working with databases such as SQLite, Firebase, or similar technologies.  
	Familiarity with cloud services such as AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure.
	Knowledge of backend technologies such as Node.js, Python, or PHP is an advantage.  
	Familiarity with development tools such as Android Studio and Xcode.  


Skills & Competencies:


	Proficiency in Flutter and React Native for cross-platform development.
	Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
	Knowledge of UI/UX principles and best practices.
	Experience using version control tools such as Git.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills.  


Working Conditions:


	The role requires working in an air-conditioned office environment for extended periods and may occasionally require off-site work.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

        HTS Africa is a fast-growing wholesale and retail fashion distribution company focused on making fashion products easily accessible across Africa. We specialize in streetwear and everyday fashion essentials while building a modern, systems-driven business powered by creativity, accountability, and continuous improvement.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Assistant

Job Location: Lagos

Description

At HTS Africa, you will have the opportunity to:


	Work directly within a growing fashion business

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales / Marketing Manager",
  "description": "Shopnig Mall Ibadan is an E-commerce store with physical and online presence. We deal with premium tech gadgets, phone accessories and more.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales / Marketing Manager

Job Location: Bodija, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Monday &ndash; Saturday (9:00 AM &ndash; 6:00 PM)

What We Are Looking For


	We are looking for a leader, not just a manager someone who can take ownership of the business, drive measurable growth, motivate a sales team, identify opportunities, execute profitable initiatives, and consistently deliver results.
	One who is well experienced, highly driven, and commercially minded who will lead and grow our tech and gadget retail store.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for driving sales, increasing profitability, managing the sales team, implementing innovative marketing initiatives, and ensuring the store consistently achieves its revenue goals.
	Our product range includes, but is not limited to, smartphones, laptops, tablets, kids&#39; tablets, gaming devices, power banks, cameras, accessories, smart gadgets, and other consumer electronics.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive daily, weekly, and monthly sales performance to achieve and exceed revenue targets.
	Lead, supervise, mentor, and manage all sales representatives and store personnel.
	Develop and implement practical sales strategies to improve store profitability and market share.
	Introduce innovative, creative, and profitable business initiatives that drive customer acquisition and revenue growth.
	Plan and execute strategic marketing campaigns, promotions, product activations, and customer engagement activities.
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities, corporate partnerships, bulk sales opportunities, and strategic collaborations.
	Monitor inventory movement and ensure optimal stock turnover while minimizing losses.
	Ensure excellent customer service standards and customer retention practices.
	Meet specified monthly target
	Conduct regular market research and competitor analysis to identify trends and opportunities.
	Prepare and submit detailed weekly sales, operational, and performance reports to management.
	Track key business metrics and recommend corrective actions where performance falls below expectations.
	Ensure effective store operations, product display standards, and overall business efficiency.
	Take ownership of store profitability and implement initiatives that positively impact business growth.
	Carry out other duties and responsibilities as may be assigned by management.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Daily, weekly, and monthly sales achievement.
	Revenue and profit growth.
	New customer acquisition and retention.
	Team productivity and performance.
	Inventory turnover rate.
	Success of promotional and marketing campaigns.
	Quality and timeliness of weekly reports.
	Growth in corporate and partnership sales.


Requirements


	HND/Bsc Degree or equivalent professional experience in Business Administration, Marketing, Sales, or a related field.
	3&ndash;5 years of proven experience in retail sales management, business development, store management, or a similar leadership role.
	Prior experience within the technology, gadgets, electronics, telecommunications, or related industry is highly preferred.
	Demonstrated track record of increasing sales and improving business performance.
	Strong leadership and team management abilities.
	Excellent negotiation, communication, and relationship-building skills.
	Strong analytical and reporting skills with the ability to make data-driven decisions.
	Creative thinker with the ability to develop innovative sales and marketing initiatives.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel and reporting tools.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: eniola@wiseki.com using &quot;Application for Sales / Marketing Manager&quot; as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-10",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-20",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Sales / Marketing Manager Job at Shopnig Mall Ibadan




        
    

        
        Shopnig Mall Ibadan is an E-commerce store with physical and online presence. We deal with premium tech gadgets, phone accessories and more.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales / Marketing Manager

Job Location: Bodija, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Monday – Saturday (9:00 AM – 6:00 PM)

What We Are Looking For
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a leader, not just a manager someone who can take ownership of the business, drive measurable growth, motivate a sales team, identify opportunities, execute profitable initiatives, and consistently deliver results.
	One who is well experienced, highly driven, and commercially minded who will lead and grow our tech and gadget retail store.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for driving sales, increasing profitability, managing the sales team, implementing innovative marketing initiatives, and ensuring the store consistently achieves its revenue goals.
	Our product range includes, but is not limited to, smartphones, laptops, tablets, kids' tablets, gaming devices, power banks, cameras, accessories, smart gadgets, and other consumer electronics.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive daily, weekly, and monthly sales performance to achieve and exceed revenue targets.
	Lead, supervise, mentor, and manage all sales representatives and store personnel.
	Develop and implement practical sales strategies to improve store profitability and market share.
	Introduce innovative, creative, and profitable business initiatives that drive customer acquisition and revenue growth.
	Plan and execute strategic marketing campaigns, promotions, product activations, and customer engagement activities.
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities, corporate partnerships, bulk sales opportunities, and strategic collaborations.
	Monitor inventory movement and ensure optimal stock turnover while minimizing losses.
	Ensure excellent customer service standards and customer retention practices.
	Meet specified monthly target
	Conduct regular market research and competitor analysis to identify trends and opportunities.
	Prepare and submit detailed weekly sales, operational, and performance reports to management.
	Track key business metrics and recommend corrective actions where performance falls below expectations.
	Ensure effective store operations, product display standards, and overall business efficiency.
	Take ownership of store profitability and implement initiatives that positively impact business growth.
	Carry out other duties and responsibilities as may be assigned by management.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Daily, weekly, and monthly sales achievement.
	Revenue and profit growth.
	New customer acquisition and retention.
	Team productivity and performance.
	Inventory turnover rate.
	Success of promotional and marketing campaigns.
	Quality and timeliness of weekly reports.
	Growth in corporate and partnership sales.


Requirements


	HND/Bsc Degree or equivalent professional experience in Business Administration, Marketing, Sales, or a related field.
	3–5 years of proven experience in retail sales management, business development, store management, or a similar leadership role.
	Prior experience within the technology, gadgets, electronics, telecommunications, or related industry is highly preferred.
	Demonstrated track record of increasing sales and improving business performance.
	Strong leadership and team management abilities.
	Excellent negotiation, communication, and relationship-building skills.
	Strong analytical and reporting skills with the ability to make data-driven decisions.
	Creative thinker with the ability to develop innovative sales and marketing initiatives.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel and reporting tools.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application for Sales / Marketing Manager" as the subject of the mail.
